methods.name: Material
methods.signature: public RenderMaterial Material(int index)
methods.summary: Call this method to get the render material associated with the mesh at the specified index. Will return null if there is no material associated with the requested mesh.

params.name: index
params.doc: The zero based index of the item in the list. Valid values are greater than or equal to 0 and less than Count.

returns.doc: If there is a render material associated at the requested index then the material is returned otherwise null is returned.

methods.name: Mesh
methods.signature: public Mesh Mesh(int index)
methods.summary: Get the mesh for the primitive at the specified index. If the item at this index is a primitive type other than a mesh then it mesh representation is returned.

params.name: index
params.doc: The zero based index of the item in the list. Valid values are greater than or equal to 0 and less than Count.

returns.doc: Returns the mesh for the primitive at the specified index. If the item at this index is a primitive type other than a mesh then it mesh representation is returned.

methods.name: MeshInstance
methods.signature: public Mesh MeshInstance(int index, out Transform instance_transform)
methods.summary: Get the mesh for the primitive at the specified index. If the item at this index is a primitive type other than a mesh then it mesh representation is returned.

params.name: index
params.doc: The zero based index of the item in the list. Valid values are greater than or equal to 0 and less than Count.

params.name: instance_transform
params.doc: Receives the transformation of this mesh.

returns.doc: Returns the mesh for the primitive at the specified index. If the item at this index is a primitive type other than a mesh then it mesh representation is returned.

methods.name: PrimitiveType
methods.signature: public RenderPrimitiveType PrimitiveType(int index)
methods.summary: Type of primitive object at this index.

params.name: index
params.doc: The zero based index of the item in the list. Valid values are greater than or equal to 0 and less than Count.

returns.doc: Primitive type of the item at this index.

methods.name: ToMaterialArray
methods.signature: public RenderMaterial[] ToMaterialArray()
methods.summary: Call this method to see if there are any RenderMaterials associated with the meshes. Each primitive can optionally have a RenderMaterial associated with it, if the RenderMaterial is null then check for a RhinoObject.RenderMaterial.

returns.doc: Return an array that of the same size as the ToMeshArray() containing the RenderMaterial associated with the mesh, may contain null entries if there is no RenderMaterial associated with the custom mesh.

methods.name: ToMeshArray
methods.signature: public Mesh[] ToMeshArray()
methods.summary: Call this method to get a array of meshes, all primitives will get meshed and the meshes will get included in the returned array.

returns.doc: Return an array of meshes from this list, this will convert all primitives to meshes.

methods.name: TryGetBox
methods.signature: public bool TryGetBox(int index, out Box box)
methods.summary: Call this method to get a box at the specified index.

params.name: index
params.doc: The zero based index of the item in the list. Valid values are greater than or equal to 0 and less than Count.

params.name: box
params.doc: Will contain the box at the requested index if the index is in range and the primitive at the requested index is a box.

returns.doc: Return true if the index is in range and the primitive at the requested index is a box otherwise returns false.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Number of meshes in this list

properties.name: RhinoObject
properties.summary: The Rhino object associated with this list

properties.name: UseObjectsMappingChannels
properties.summary: Returns true if the texture mapping will be taken from the Rhino object otherwise; the texture mapping will use the texture coordinates on the mesh only.
